column1: # /File Combine — merge a disk file into the active workbook starting
# at the pointer. Three operations (Copy / Add / Subtract) cross two
# This transcript builds a small source file, then exercises Copy
# Entire-File, Add Entire-File, and Add Named-Or-Specified-Range.
# --- build the source file: A1=10, A2=20 ---
# --- fresh workbook; pointer at B2; /FCCE merges source onto pointer ---
# --- /FCAE adds the source values to existing targets ---
# --- /FCSN subtracts a typed source range (A1..A1 = 10) at pointer ---
# B2 was 20, minus source A1 (10) = 10. B3 untouched (range covered only A1).
